description:
GIVEN a user is playing a video
AND the playhead is in the middle of the scrubber bar

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates fast forward
AND the user does not stop fast forward
steps.result:
THEN the playhead fast forwards to the end of the video
AND once the playhead reaches the end of the video, fast forward stops automatically
AND once fast forward stops, the video player is dismissed
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page
